# ====================================
# Two-word phrases to use after "from"
# ====================================

max_length = 24
number_of_words = 2

# Establishments
big corporation
fancy cafe
prestigious college
prestigious university

# Places
small town
big city
foreign country
wild west
the countryside

# Sides
the east
the north
the south
the west

# Weird places
ancient ruins
another dimension
another planet
black lodge
flying circus
secret laboratory
the government
the future
the labyrinth
the past
the stars
